sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: [15-12G] TEGNA INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: TEGNA Inc. has filed a Form 15-12G with the SEC, certifying the termination of its registration under Section 12(g) or suspension of duty to file reports. This filing follows the merger of TEGNA with Teton Merger Sub, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Nexstar Media Group, Inc., on March 19, 2026, making TEGNA a wholly-owned subsidiary of Nexstar with only one record holder of its common stock.

feed.title: TER Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ) $354.62 +12.42% 08 Apr 2026: AI demand fuels analyst focus
feed.summary: Teradyne, Inc. (TER) shares jumped over 12% on April 8, 2026, reaching $354.62, driven by strong demand for AI-related robotics and semiconductor test equipment. While the company exhibits strong fundamentals like high net margins and cash flow, its valuation metrics (PE of 92.36, P/S of 15.66, P/B of 17.85) are considered rich. Analyst consensus suggests potential downside from current levels, with an average price target of $275.53 and Meyka AI's model projecting $161.34 within a year.

feed.title: Southwest Gas stock hits 52-week high at 90.03 USD
feed.summary: Southwest Gas Holdings Inc. (SWX) stock reached a new 52-week high of $90.03, marking a significant increase of 36.86% over the past year and 11.99% year-to-date. The company's attractive valuation is supported by a PEG ratio of 0.22 and it offers a 2.79% dividend yield, having maintained dividend payments for 56 consecutive years. Despite a recent mixed financial performance in Q4 2025 with an EPS beat but a significant revenue shortfall, the stock's performance reflects strong investor confidence.

feed.title: TSMC 2026 North America Technology Symposium to feature Silvaco Group, Inc. at booth 715
feed.summary: Silvaco Group, Inc. announced its participation in the TSMC 2026 North America Technology Symposium on April 22, where it will showcase its technology advancements at booth 715 in the Ecosystem Pavilion. The company has a history of innovation, including a new organic transport model for OLED displays and webinars on accelerating advanced logic development through simulation. Silvaco's presence at the symposium underscores its ongoing commitment to technological progress and industry collaboration.

feed.title: EOG Resources Is Maintained at Overweight by Wells Fargo
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has maintained its "Overweight" rating for EOG Resources. The article title provides this key information about the analyst action.

feed.title: Why is KLA Corporation (KLAC) stock soaring today
feed.summary: The article is a placeholder with "MSN" as its content, indicating that the actual content for why KLA Corporation (KLAC) stock is soaring today is missing or was not loaded. No specific information about KLA Corporation's stock performance or the reasons behind it can be extracted from this placeholder.

feed.title: Certa Named A Leader in the First Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Third-Party Risk Management Tools
feed.summary: Certa has been recognized as a Leader in Gartner's inaugural Magic Quadrant for Third-Party Risk Management Tools for Assurance Leaders. This distinction highlights Certa's advanced capabilities, including AI-native risk detection and continuous monitoring, in a market where TPRM is transitioning from a compliance function to a strategic one. Certa, despite being a young company, is praised for significantly reducing third-party onboarding times and providing comprehensive lifecycle management.

feed.title: The Franchise Game 2026 Returns to Yum! Brands Headquarters for Its Fourth Year
feed.summary: The Franchise Game is returning for its fourth year to Yum! Brands Headquarters in Plano, Texas, offering an elevated experience for current and aspiring franchise owners. The event, founded by Tarji Carter, Dessie Brown Jr., and Daylon A. Goff, will feature insights from top-performing franchisees, economic development panels, and a trade show with access to numerous franchise brands. A key highlight will be the presentation of the Roland Parrish Impact Award, recognizing leadership and community impact within the franchising sector.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Lowers Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) Price Target to $92.00
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has lowered its price target for Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) to $92.00 from $100.00, while maintaining an "equal weight" rating. This new target implies an 8.06% potential upside from the stock's current price. Despite this reduction, the consensus among analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $95.13, and the company recently surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue estimates.

feed.title: Church & Dwight (NYSE:CHD) Price Target Lowered to $105.00 at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has lowered its price target for Church & Dwight (NYSE:CHD) from $110.00 to $105.00 but maintained an "overweight" rating, indicating an 11.78% potential upside. This adjustment comes amidst mixed analyst coverage, with the stock currently holding a "Hold" consensus rating and an average price target of $101.94. The company recently reported Q4 EPS of $0.86, beating estimates, and has set FY2026 guidance at $3.71-$3.81 EPS.

feed.title: Eversource backs out of three solar projects supported by state
feed.summary: Eversource has decided to withdraw from three state-supported solar power purchase agreements in Connecticut, affecting 54 megawatts of solar power, citing concerns over overpriced contracts and the lack of a comprehensive energy strategy in the state. The utility company believes these contracts are not in the customer's best interest due to potential increases in the public benefits charge. This decision has surprised the Department of Energy and Environmental Protection (DEEP), which maintains that the projects would lower costs for ratepayers and were part of a competitive bidding process Eversource was involved in.

feed.title: Teradyne, Applied Materials, Monolithic Power Systems, Western Digital, and Semtech Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Teradyne, Applied Materials, Monolithic Power Systems, Western Digital, and Semtech surged following the de-escalation of the U.S.-Iran conflict. The rally in semiconductor stocks is attributed to the reduced risk of supply chain disruptions, particularly with the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, crucial for materials used in chip fabrication. Teradyne, in particular, saw an 11.6% jump, reaching a new 52-week high, as the market reacted positively to the improved geopolitical outlook for the semiconductor industry.

feed.title: Stellantis in advanced talks to develop Opel EV with China's Leapmotor
feed.summary: Stellantis is reportedly in advanced discussions with China's Leapmotor to co-develop an Opel-branded electric SUV, leveraging Leapmotor's technology and producing it at Stellantis' Zaragoza plant in Spain. This collaboration aims to reduce EV development costs and time for Stellantis, while also helping it compete with Chinese brands in Europe and improve plant utilization. The potential deal, which could be finalized this month, involves Leapmotor supplying key technologies and components, with Opel focusing on exterior design.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $877,000 Uncapped Return Enhanced Notes, due April 10, 2031, which are fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes are linked to the lesser performing of the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and the Invesco QQQ Trust SM, Series 1, offering investors 1.50 times any appreciation of the lesser performing fund at maturity. The investment carries significant risks, including potential principal loss and credit risk of both the issuer and guarantor.

feed.title: Former Joann store claimed by Goodwill rival for sprawling 22,461 sq ft spot
feed.summary: Savers Value Village, a Goodwill rival, is set to take over a 22,461-square-foot former Joann store location in the Great Southern Shopping Center in Bridgeville, Pennsylvania. Joann had filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy and closed its physical stores by May 31, leading to other retailers like Bob’s Discount Furniture, Burlington, Goodwill, and Savers Value Village occupying their former spaces. This marks Savers' first Western Pennsylvania location, adding to its approximately 165 national stores and becoming the sixth in Pennsylvania, with a grand opening expected in the fourth quarter of 2026.

feed.title: FedEx Freight Details Spinoff Strategy
feed.summary: FedEx Freight is preparing for its spin-off from FedEx Corp on June 1, 2026, aiming to become a leaner, more agile, and independent company listed as FDXF on the NYSE. Executives outlined a strategy focusing on high-margin services, technological integration, and targeting high-growth verticals using a tiered commercial approach. The new entity, possessing a vast infrastructure, projects 4% to 6% revenue growth and over $1 billion in annual free cash flow, while maintaining a preferred LTL provider status for FedEx.

feed.title: Stifel initiates Summit Therapeutics stock with buy rating By Investing.com
feed.summary: Stifel initiated coverage on Summit Therapeutics plc (NASDAQ:SMMT) with a buy rating and a price target of $45.00, representing a potential upside of 134%. The firm highlighted Ivonescimab, a bispecific antibody, as well-positioned in a large market and noted positive clinical evidence. Despite a recent earnings miss, other analysts have mostly maintained bullish outlooks, with some adjusting price targets due to timing uncertainties in China trials.

feed.title: Procter And Gamble Taps WNBA Growth As Valuation Signals Potential Upside
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) has formed a multi-year, multi-brand partnership with the WNBA to enhance brand engagement across its household, beauty, and personal care products through women's sports events and athlete collaborations. This strategic marketing move aims to connect everyday brands with a rapidly growing audience in women's basketball, offering new platforms for campaigns and retailer collaborations. Analysts project the stock to be undervalued by approximately 15%, and Simply Wall St's valuation suggests it trades 30.7% below its estimated fair value, despite an 8% decline in the last 30 days.

feed.title: 90% of Citizens’ employees completed some form of gen AI training in 2025
feed.summary: Citizens Bank is integrating generative AI directly into its employees' daily workflows rather than offering it as a separate tool. The bank has provided over 17,000 employees with access to Microsoft Copilot Chat, and 2,900 employees currently use the full Copilot suite, with plans to expand this to 5,500 this year. This strategy aims to embed AI seamlessly across platforms like Outlook, Teams, and PowerPoint.

feed.title: Why is Texas Instruments stock up today?
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) stock is up 3.94% today, trading at $207.61, driven by Raleigh Capital Management increasing its stake by over 1,600% in Q4 and a robust dividend policy. While technical indicators suggest bullish short- and long-term trends and strong institutional interest, some experts caution about short-term overbought signals and a high payout ratio exceeding earnings, which could lead to volatility. The stock is above key moving averages, with support at $206 and resistance around $210, but mixed momentum signals warrant careful monitoring.

feed.title: Why Microchip Technology (MCHP) Stock Is Up Today
feed.summary: Shares of Microchip Technology (MCHP) jumped 5.2% following the de-escalation of the U.S.-Iran conflict, which is expected to ease supply chain disruptions critical for chip fabrication. While the market considers this news meaningful, Microchip Technology's stock has seen significant volatility, and despite a year-to-date gain of 9.2%, it remains 12% below its 52-week high.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) Tracks Cloud Security Growth In Nasdaq Today
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) is gaining market attention following a target revision, reflecting its strong position in digital infrastructure amid Nasdaq movements. The article highlights the company's role in cloud security growth and its significance in supporting global internet performance. Access to the full article requires login or registration.

feed.title: Rosen Law Firm Urges Stellantis N.V. (NYSE: STLA) Stockholders to Contact the Firm for Information About Their Rights
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Stellantis N.V. (NYSE: STLA) on behalf of investors who purchased stock between February 26, 2025, and February 5, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Stellantis made misleading statements regarding its earnings growth potential and its position in the electric vehicle market. Shareholders are encouraged to contact the firm by June 8, 2026, to potentially serve as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: TD (TD) $10 autocallable notes linked to Nasdaq-100, callable up to 2032
feed.summary: The Toronto-Dominion Bank is offering $10 principal amount autocallable strategic accelerated redemption securities linked to the Nasdaq-100 Index, maturing in April 2032. These notes feature annual call options, with payments dependent on the Index's performance and a full principal return only if the Ending Value is at or above 85% of the Starting Value, otherwise holders risk 1:1 downside beyond a 15% decline. The offering includes an underwriting discount and hedging charge, and all payments are subject to TD's credit risk, with an estimated initial value between $9.126 and $9.426 per unit.

feed.title: Why Terns Pharmaceuticals Stock Rocked the Market in March
feed.summary: Terns Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: TERN) saw a significant stock price increase in March due to an agreement to be acquired by Merck for $53 per share in cash, totaling approximately $6.7 billion. The deal represents a 42% premium over Terns' 90-day volume-weighted average price and is expected to close in the current quarter. Terns' lead drug candidate, TERN-701 for chronic myeloid Leukemia, is considered the primary asset in this acquisition, which analysts believe is a bargain for Merck.

feed.title: P&G names new health care CEO as 33-year veteran retires
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble has appointed Paul Gama as the new CEO of its health care business unit. This unit generated nearly $12 billion in sales last year. Gama's appointment follows the retirement of a 33-year veteran from the company.

feed.title: Modernized recycling facility in Massachusetts
feed.summary: Republic Services has celebrated the opening of its modernized Peabody Recycling Center in Massachusetts, which features advanced technologies like AI and ballistic sorters to increase processing capacity and material quality. The 54,000-square-foot facility aims to lead recycling efforts in the Greater Boston area by diverting more material from landfills and producing cleaner commodities. Community leaders and local officials attended the opening, highlighting the center's commitment to sustainability.

feed.title: Silversea Cruises Enhances Loyalty Program with New Tiers and Benefits
feed.summary: Silversea Cruises is revamping its Venetian Society loyalty program, guided by guest feedback. Debuting on July 1, 2026, the enhancements include new ways to earn status, two new loyalty milestones at 15 and 50 VS Days, and enriched benefits across all tiers, aimed at recognizing members earlier and rewarding continued loyalty.

feed.title: Rosen Law Firm Urges Stellantis N.V. (NYSE: STLA) Stockholders to Contact the Firm for Information About Their Rights
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit on behalf of purchasers of Stellantis N.V. (NYSE: STLA) common stock between February 26, 2025, and February 5, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Stellantis made false and misleading statements about its earnings growth potential and electrification strategy. Stockholders who wish to serve as lead plaintiff must file their motion with the court by June 8, 2026.

feed.title: Qualcomm shares jump as stock buying pressure builds
feed.summary: Qualcomm (QCOM) shares increased by 2.16% today, reaching $126.70, despite remaining below key moving averages and showing bearish technical signals. The company continues to return capital to shareholders through a $20 billion share buyback program and dividends, and benefits from exposure to AI and data center trends. Analysts note persistent seller pressure but also potential short-term tactical opportunities given oversold conditions.

feed.title: Merck & Co Inc Stock (MRK) Moved Up by 3.18% on Apr 8: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Merck & Co Inc (MRK) stock rose by 3.18% driven by positive developments including strong Phase 3 results for its oral PCSK9 inhibitor enlicitide, EU approval for Keytruda in ovarian cancer, and the acquisition of Terns Pharmaceuticals. Analyst sentiment is positive, with several firms reiterating "Buy" ratings. Despite current growth, the company faces future revenue concentration risks with Keytruda's patent expiry and impacts from the Inflation Reduction Act.

feed.title: American Express Co Stock (AXP) Moved Up by 3.16% on Apr 8: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: American Express (AXP) stock rose by 3.16% on April 8, driven by investor confidence in its financial outlook and strategic initiatives. Key factors include a 16% increase in its quarterly dividend, robust 2026 earnings guidance, and its most significant commercial product expansion in recent history, which includes new business cards and AI-powered features. Despite some analyst downgrades, the company benefits from a resilient premium customer base and a new NFL partnership, contributing to a positive market sentiment.

feed.title: TALO PE Ratio & Valuation, Is TALO Overvalued
feed.summary: Talos Energy Inc (TALO) is currently considered overvalued, with its stock trading above its fair price range of $11.15 to $14.23. The company's current forward P/S ratio of 1.50 is significantly higher than its five-year average, and its P/B ratio and FCF yield also suggest an overvalued position relative to historical averages. Despite competitor P/S ratios being higher, TALO's negative revenue growth indicates this premium may not be sustainable.

feed.title: Who owns America's regional amusement parks?
feed.summary: This article details the current ownership landscape of America's regional amusement parks, highlighting recent transactions that have reshaped the industry. It provides an overview of major park operators like Six Flags, Herschend, Enchanted Parks, United Parks, and Merlin Entertainments, along with a brief history of their acquisitions and holdings, and also touches upon notable independent parks. The piece serves as a guide to understanding which parks are currently managed by which companies.

feed.title: Barclays (ATMP) autocallable notes with up to 59.25% early premium
feed.summary: Barclays Bank PLC has priced autocallable notes (ATMP) linked to the INDU, NDX, and RTY indices, with a total initial sale of $4,369,000. These notes offer fixed Redemption Premiums of up to 59.25% if automatically redeemed early, but pay no interest and expose investors to potential principal loss if not called and the Least Performing Underlier falls below a 70% barrier. Investors also face Barclays' credit risk and the potential exercise of U.K. bail-in powers.

feed.title: Polyester Sleep Pillow Market Size, Share & By Top Companies- Tempur Sealy International, Inc., Serta Simmons Bedding, LLC, Sleep Number Corporation, My Pillow, Inc.
feed.summary: The Polyester Sleep Pillow market is experiencing significant growth, driven by increasing awareness of sleep health and comfort, particularly among younger and wellness-conscious consumers. The market is also expanding in healthcare due to the pillows' hypoallergenic properties and ease of cleaning, as well as into emerging applications like smart sleep technology. North America currently holds a significant share, while Asia-Pacific is projected for the fastest growth due to rapid industrialization and digital adoption.

feed.title: 1st Source (SRCE) Gains 3.65% Over the Past Week: Key Information to Note
feed.summary: 1st Source (SRCE) has gained 3.65% over the past week, outperforming its industry and showing strong momentum, reflected in its Consensus EPS estimates. The company holds a Zacks Momentum Style Score of B and a Zacks Rank of #2 (Buy), suggesting potential for near-term growth. This analysis incorporates price movements and positive earnings estimate revisions to underscore SRCE's promising outlook.

feed.title: Keynote Remarks and Conversation with Mary C. Daly
feed.summary: Mary C. Daly, President and CEO of the Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco, will deliver keynote remarks at an event hosted by the St. George Area Chamber of Commerce. Following her speech, she will participate in a moderated conversation with Chip Childs, focusing on the economy and monetary policy. The event will be livestreamed and a recording will be available later.
feed.source: Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco
feed.source_domain: Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco

feed.title: Textron Aviation Names 2026 Top Hawk Recipients
feed.summary: Textron Aviation has announced the five recipients for its 2026 Top Hawk training support program, which aims to foster the next generation of pilots. The program, now in its second decade, provides selected flight schools with a factory-new Cessna Skyhawk aircraft for one year to modernize training fleets and expand access to advanced piston trainers. Since its inception in 2015, Top Hawk has delivered 55 new Skyhawks, benefiting over 1,000 student pilots.

feed.title: Golden Nugget owner Tilman Fertitta considering purchase of Caesars Entertainment
feed.summary: Tilman Fertitta, owner of Golden Nugget Casino and the Houston Rockets, is reportedly considering purchasing Caesars Entertainment. This acquisition would bring Fertitta back into the online casino space after selling Golden Nugget Online Gaming in 2022. While Caesars is also considering a management-led buyout, reports of a potential sale have already led to an increase in Caesars' stock value, despite the company carrying over $20 billion in debt.

feed.title: Autodesk, Marqeta, and Commerce Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Autodesk, Marqeta, and Commerce stocks experienced significant jumps in the afternoon trading session after the Nasdaq surged due to a de-escalation of the U.S.-Iran conflict. This "risk-on" environment, with reduced geopolitical tension and fading energy-induced inflation concerns, favors growth-oriented software companies. Investors are also taking relief from previously high geopolitical instability and are buying the dip in high-quality SaaS stocks after the "SaaSpocalypse" correction earlier in 2026.

feed.title: Union Pacific Railroad and Amtrak Reach Agreement on Track Usage in Louisiana for the Sunset Limited
feed.summary: Union Pacific Railroad and Amtrak have reached an agreement for Amtrak to use a 5-mile segment of Union Pacific track near Avondale, Louisiana, for its Sunset Limited service. This agreement, effective April 1, 2026, highlights the ongoing collaboration between Union Pacific and Amtrak to enhance passenger and freight rail services. Amtrak trains currently operate millions of miles annually across both Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern networks.

feed.title: Broadridge (BR) director Eileen Murray granted 384 deferred stock units
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions director Eileen K. Murray has been granted 384 Deferred Stock Units under the company's 2018 Omnibus Award Plan. These units, which vest immediately and will settle in common stock after her separation from service, were issued in lieu of cash director compensation. This transaction increases her direct holdings to 5,246 shares of Broadridge common stock.

feed.title: Analysts: J.B. Hunt Q1 earnings, revenue to rise
feed.summary: Analysts predict J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc. will report increased earnings and revenue for Q1, driven by an improving freight market. The Lowell-based company is expected to post $1.45 earnings per share and $2.95 billion in revenue. Stephens Inc. maintained an overweight rating and raised the target price to $240, citing strengthening intermodal volumes and a focus on reducing operating costs.

feed.title: Broadridge (NYSE: BR) director defers cash pay for 177 stock units
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions director Annette L. Nazareth received 177 Deferred Stock Units (DCUs) as a result of deferring her cash compensation under the company's Director Deferred Compensation Program. These DCUs represent 177 shares of Broadridge common stock and were granted under the 2018 Omnibus Award Plan, vesting immediately. The shares will be settled upon her separation from service with the company, bringing her direct holdings to 9,336 shares of common stock.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC (JPMorgan Financial) is offering Structured Investments Auto Callable Contingent Interest Notes linked to the common stock of Micron Technology, Inc., fully guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes are designed for investors seeking Contingent Interest Payments, with automatic calls possible if Micron's stock price meets certain conditions. Investors face risks including potential loss of principal and dependence on the creditworthiness of JPMorgan Financial and JPMorgan Chase & Co.

feed.title: SFL Corporation Sets May 11, 2026 AGM With Key Capital Flexibility Proposal
feed.summary: SFL Corporation will hold its 2026 Annual General Meeting on May 11, 2026, in Hamilton, Bermuda. Key proposals include re-electing the board, re-appointing auditors, approving director fees, and most notably, redesignating common shares into preference shares to enhance capital flexibility. This move aims to diversify funding options for the company as detailed in its 2025 Annual Report.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Keeps Their Hold Rating on Travelers Companies (TRV)
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst Bob Huang has maintained a Hold rating on Travelers Companies (TRV) with a price target of $310.00. Travelers Companies recently reported strong quarterly revenues and net profits, but corporate insider sentiment is negative due to increased selling of shares by insiders. The Street generally suggests a Moderate Buy consensus with an average price target of $306.00.

feed.title: ADP shares dip after new tax document support amid broad-based technical weakness
feed.summary: ADP shares dropped 1.22% to $201.12, reflecting significant bearish technical indicators despite the company offering support for individuals navigating tax documentation. Technical analysis shows ADP trading below key moving averages with strong sell signals from momentum indicators, suggesting a high probability of further downside. The expected trading range for next week is $197.50–$201.30, with sellers maintaining short-term control.

feed.title: Ford and Toyota Surges 6%: Two Auto Giants Prove the Global Car Market Is Alive and Well
feed.summary: Ford and Toyota's shares both rose 6% today, indicating robust global consumer vehicle demand despite earlier declines and significant tariff headwinds. Ford's surge is attributed to sustained F-Series truck demand and strong Super Duty sales, while Toyota benefited from a 5% increase in Taiwan vehicle sales and a nearly 50% surge in BEV retail sales. Both companies are navigating challenges like tariffs and EV costs but are showing resilience in their respective markets.
